name: Dewdrop & Swiss
description:
Dew had shown interest in you for a long time, but, despite his fiery temperament, was too scared to ask you out. Swiss took the matter into his own hands and decided to get both them caught while he jacks Dew off.

Thank Droogie, he helped me getting that little brainworm out 🩷

Exhibitionism ⛧ Wing Man (Ghoul) Swiss

The Band Ghost・Ghost B.C.・Sodo Ghoul・Swiss Ghoul・Dewdrop Ghoul
creator: fennec1234
